scope: Armor Specialist talent tree and the shared Armored Defense talent source data

talents.name: Armored Defense

talents.name: Improved Armored Defense
talents.classification: real; implemented correctly by DefenseCalculator after proficiency-gate cleanup

talents.name: Armor Mastery

talents.name: Juggernaut
talents.classification: real; now wired in ModifierEngine armor speed penalty path while proficiently armored
removedExtraneous: stale global armor speedPenalty Active Effect

talents.name: Second Skin

notes: The Ability Engine remains authoritative. Armor Specialist talents are retained as PASSIVE/STATE metadata unless they are owned by existing defense/speed runtime paths.
No broad missing-staticSheetPolicy behavior was added.
Knight's Armor duplicate Armor Mastery was intentionally not patched in this pass; it should be handled with the Knight's Armor tree.
